segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer this question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

segments.text: What would Julie like to do if she had the money?

translations.zh-Hans: 如果朱莉有了钱，她想做什么？

segments.text: Are you doing the football pools, Brian?

translations.zh-Hans: 布赖恩，你在填足球赛博彩单吗？

segments.text: I'm sure we'll win something this week.

translations.zh-Hans: 我相信我们这周会赢点什么。

segments.text: You always say that, but we never win anything.

translations.zh-Hans: 你总是这么说，可我们从来什么也没赢过。

segments.text: What will you do if you win a lot of money?

translations.zh-Hans: 如果你赢了很多钱，你会做什么？

segments.text: If I win a lot of money, I'll buy you a mink coat.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果我赢了很多钱，我会给你买一件貂皮大衣。

segments.text: I don't want a mink coat.
I want to see the world.
If we win a lot of money, we'll travel around the world and we'll stay at the best hotels.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果我们赢了很多钱，我们就环游世界，住最好的酒店。

segments.text: Then we'll return home and buy a big house in the country.

translations.zh-Hans: 然后我们回国，在乡下买一栋大房子。

segments.text: We'll have a beautiful garden and… But if we spend all that money, we'll be poor again.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们会有一个漂亮的花园，而且……可是，如果我们把钱全花光，就又会变穷。

segments.text: If we spend all the money, we'll try and win the football pools again.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果把钱全花光了，我们就再去赢一次足球赛博彩。

segments.text: It's a pleasant dream, but everything depends on if.

translations.zh-Hans: 这个梦很美好，但一切都取决于那个“如果”。
